name: WeCom Bot MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for WeCom (WeChat Work / Weixin Enterprise) bot messaging. Enables AI agents to send messages, notifications, and alerts to WeCom group chats via WeCom's Bot Webhook API. Primarily used for automated notifications in Chinese enterprise environments using WeCom as their internal messaging platform.
use_cases: Sending automated alerts and notifications to WeCom groups from monitoring agents
Routing operational notifications to Chinese enterprise teams via WeCom bots
Integrating AI workflow outputs into WeCom group chats from orchestration agents
Building chatbot notifications for Chinese enterprise platforms using WeCom
not_for: Teams outside China not using WeCom (international companies use Slack, Teams, etc.)
Reading WeCom messages (webhook bots are send-only)
best_when: A Chinese enterprise or team using WeCom (WeChat Work) wants AI agents to send automated notifications, alerts, and messages to their WeCom group chats.
avoid_when: You use Slack, Microsoft Teams, or other enterprise messaging tools. WeCom is used primarily by Chinese organizations. Also: bot webhook is send-only — not for reading messages.

auth.notes: WeCom Bot Webhook URL contains API key. Generate webhook in WeCom group chat settings. Webhook URL is the authentication mechanism.

pricing.free_tier_limits: WeCom Bot API is free for WeCom users
pricing.notes: WeCom is free for teams (with some feature tiers). Bot API is free. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: WeCom bot limits: 20 messages/minute per bot

known_agent_gotchas: DATA RESIDENCY: All messages go through Tencent's WeCom servers in China — consider data sovereignty
Send-only webhook — no message reading capability via this MCP
Rate limited at 20 messages/minute per bot — agent notification loops need throttling
Documentation primarily in Chinese; WeCom is China-centric platform
agent_readiness.security_notes: Messages transmitted through Tencent WeCom servers (China data residency). Webhook URL contains authentication key — keep secret. Send-only — no read access to messages.

security_score_components.security_notes: Tencent WeCom data residency in China. Message content transmitted to Tencent servers. Webhook URL is sensitive — treat as credential.
